title: The One Job AI Can't Replace, According to @3blue1brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews 3Blue1Brown on a YouTube video about a job that AI cannot replace. The video presents a commentary on AI capabilities and workforce implications.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Grant Sanderson of 3Blue1Brown on the question of which job AI cannot replace. The conversation frames AI capabilities against workforce implications, touching on workflow automation and job displacement. The discussion is a commentary rather than a technical breakdown, centered on where human work holds up as AI tools expand.
